meta.title: CHFA Repeat-Submittal Watchlist — Next-Round Candidates
meta.source: F121 proxy analysis of CHFA award drought + HNA need + Prop 123 readiness + multi-phase trajectory
meta.method: CHFA does NOT publish unsuccessful LIHTC applicants. This watchlist uses four proxy signals layered together: (1) AWARD DROUGHT against prior LIHTC history in chfa-properties.json; (2) HOUSING NEED rank from data/hna/ranking-index.json; (3) POLICY READINESS from data/policy/prop123_jurisdictions.json and data/policy/jurisdiction-housing-progress.json; (4) MULTI-PHASE TRAJECTORY regex on project names that flags likely-pending next phases.
meta.caveats: Every attempts_observed value is unknown (not measurable from public data). These are pattern-match candidates for next-round PMA attention, NOT confirmed pending applicants. Field signal_basis enumerates the four proxy hits per entry. Re-derive when chfa-properties.json or ranking-index.json refresh.
meta.next_review: After 2026 CHFA Round Two awards are announced (typically Q4 2026).

entries.sponsors_or_projects: McDermott Properties / Embrey Partners (Overlook at Thornton series, Crossing Pointe N/S)
entries.evidence_summary: rank=2 score=92.2 · gap=4,421 @ 30% AMI · 67.8% cost-burdened · Prop 123 fast-track Committed · HNA current 2024 · $10M PAB 2026 · weakest scoring axis = local-support dedicated revenue.
entries.watchlist_action: Tier-1 in PMA for next 9% round. Lead with Prop 123 land-banking + local-support commitment package.

entries.sponsors_or_projects: Edge series (Edge IV due — II 2019, III 2023); Mirasol series (II 2011, III 2018)
entries.evidence_summary: Multi-phase regex hit on TWO franchises. 100% fee waiver active since 2017 ($4.1M waived for 345 units) · regional HNA March 2026 · $450K/yr CHDF · Prop 123 fast-track. Best-stack jurisdiction in CO.
entries.watchlist_action: Highest-confidence next-round candidate. Expect re-entry in 2026 R2 or 2027 R1. Watch Loveland Housing Authority + Legacy Crossing sponsors.

entries.sponsors_or_projects: Foothills Regional Housing; Lamar Crossing series (Phase II 2020 → III plausible)
entries.evidence_summary: Second-highest dry-spell history in CO (29 priors). Prop 123 fast-track. Strategic Housing Plan Feb 2024 · 9,680-unit share · SHB-1406 sales tax dedicated. Jefferson 08059 2024 notAwarded reason: 'Undersubscribed local support; market-rate heavy'.
entries.watchlist_action: Tier-1. Application templates should lead with SHB-1406 fund commitment letter + Strategic Housing Plan citations.

entries.sponsors_or_projects: Prior winners: StarRise, Immaculata Plaza, Copper Platte
entries.evidence_summary: 11/16 priors are 4%-bond deals — pipeline plays best as a bond deal. Prop 123 fast-track · $6.93M FY2024 Prop 123 allocation · HNA current 2023. Weld 08123 2024 notAwarded entry: family, qapScore 65.
entries.watchlist_action: Tier-1 4%-bond opportunity. Recommend PAB-CO inducement resolutions early in 2026 Q3.

entries.sponsors_or_projects: Lumien Apartments series (II 2017 → III plausible); city's Innovative Housing Solutions Division
entries.evidence_summary: Strong 9% history (11/15). Prop 123 fast-track. 2025 Regional HNA with La Plata County · hotel-to-housing conversion (CO-first public financing 2024). Division at budget-deficit risk by 2028 — funding-cliff signal increases urgency.
entries.watchlist_action: Flag in PMA with budget-cliff warning. Espero (PSH model) is a tracking comp.

entries.sponsors_or_projects: Oakwood Senior series (II 2019 → III plausible); Belmont Development (Cañon City in 2026 R1)
entries.evidence_summary: 4-year drought. Prop 123 Committed (NOT fast-track). 277-unit target by 2026 · no dedicated tax · regional Douglas County approach. Local-support documentation is the weakest scoring axis.
entries.watchlist_action: Flag medium-high. Pre-application coordination with Douglas County regional partnership. Watch Oakwood Senior III.

entries.sponsors_or_projects: Fountain Ridge series (Apartments + South); Villas at Mesa Ridge
entries.evidence_summary: 71% cost-burden — one of the worst in state. 6-year+ drought. Prop 123 fast-track. El Paso 08041 has notAwarded 2025 entry: 'Weak local support documentation'.
entries.watchlist_action: High-priority underserved jurisdiction. Coordinate with PPACG and Colorado Springs UH for joint regional application strategy.

entries.evidence_summary: ZERO historical LIHTC awards. Not in Prop 123 jurisdictions file. Not in jurisdiction-housing-progress.json. 67.3% burdened. Combination = institutional gap, not lack of interest.
entries.watchlist_action: Investigate root cause first. Could be (a) covered by Adams County applications, (b) opt-out from Prop 123 by choice, or (c) zoning hostility. Flag as 'no-touch zone — investigate before pursuing'.

entries.sponsors_or_projects: Yampa Valley Housing Authority (YVHA) — Brown Ranch + Cottonwoods at Mid-Valley
entries.evidence_summary: 9% STR tax (2022) generated $14.8M in 2024 with 75% to YVHA — STRONGEST dedicated revenue in state. 2025 'Steamboat Springs Workforce Apts' awarded at county-level (Routt 08107) but city-level chfa-properties.json last record is 2020 → ArcGIS lag, city-proper still in dry-spell.
entries.watchlist_action: Re-verify 2025 award city vs county. Either way, policy stack is best-in-state. Track YVHA closely for 2026 R2; prioritize Brown Ranch advancement to LIHTC.
